title: Matt Pocock’s Agentic Engineering Workflow (just copy him)
summary: David Ondrej discusses Matt Pocock's agentic engineering workflow and recommends adopting it as a best practice. The video features practical guidance on coding with AI and includes tooling recommendations such as SerpApi for web search integration.
writeup: David Ondrej walks through Matt Pocock's agentic engineering workflow and frames it as a template worth copying for coding with AI. The video offers practical guidance on AI-assisted development and prompt engineering, covering how to structure work with agentic tools. It includes tooling recommendations, naming SerpApi for adding web search to the workflow.
